channel.title: ANGPTL4 & Adipose RNA Update
channel.description: Weekly digest of ANGPTL4 biology/therapeutics and adipose-targeted RNA delivery (siRNA, ASO, LNP, GalNAc).
channel.itunes:author: Ethan Weiss

item.title: ANGPTL4 & Adipose RNA Update — Monday May 4, 2026
item.description: Six new studies reinforce ANGPTL4 as a multi-tissue regulator with relevance to lipid metabolism, diabetic complications, and emerging therapeutic strategies; no adipose-targeted RNA delivery papers appeared in the past 7 days.
item.itunes:title: ANGPTL4 & Adipose RNA Update — Monday May 4, 2026

item.title: ANGPTL4 & Adipose RNA Update — Wednesday April 29, 2026
item.description: ANGPTL4 expanded its footprint in diabetic complications this week — strong mechanistic data implicating it in proliferative diabetic retinopathy and a new review on its role in diabetic nephropathy — alongside cancer angiogenesis, lung-injury cytoprotection, and head-and-neck SCC prognosis. No new adipose-targeted RNA delivery papers (siRNA/ASO/LNP/GalNAc) appeared in the lookback window.
item.itunes:title: ANGPTL4 & Adipose RNA Update — Wednesday April 29, 2026
